with cdc_src as (

    select __dbz_operation, __dbz_timestamp, __dbz_lsn, record_data
    from [eh_xboss].[dbo].[cdc_events]
    where __dbz_table  = 'account_move'
      and __dbz_schema = 'public'
    
      and __dbz_timestamp > (select COALESCE(MAX(__dbz_timestamp), cast('1970-01-01' as datetime2(6))) from [wh_core].[cc1].[stg_xboss_cdc__account_move])
    
),
cdc_keyed as (
    select
        __dbz_operation,
        __dbz_timestamp,
        __dbz_lsn,
        
    lower(convert(varchar(50), hashbytes('md5', coalesce(convert(varchar(8000), concat(coalesce(cast(id as VARCHAR(8000)), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_'), '-', coalesce(cast(__dbz_timestamp as VARCHAR(8000)), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_'), '-', coalesce(cast(__dbz_lsn as VARCHAR(8000)), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_'))), '')), 2))
 as __event_key,

{% endif %}

model.my_new_project.stg_xboss_cdc__cons.compiled_code:
with cdc_src as (

    select __dbz_operation, __dbz_timestamp, __dbz_lsn, record_data
    from [eh_xboss].[dbo].[cdc_events]
    where __dbz_table  = 'construction_ipc_line'
      and __dbz_schema = 'public'
    
      and __dbz_timestamp > (select COALESCE(MAX(__dbz_timestamp), cast('1970-01-01' as datetime2(6))) from [wh_core].[cc1].[stg_xboss_cdc__construction_ipc_line])
    
),
cdc_keyed as (
    select
        __dbz_operation,
        __dbz_timestamp,
        __dbz_lsn,
        
    lower(convert(varchar(50), hashbytes('md5', coalesce(convert(varchar(8000), concat(coalesce(cast(id as VARCHAR(8000)), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_'), '-', coalesce(cast(__dbz_timestamp as VARCHAR(8000)), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_'), '-', coalesce(cast(__dbz_lsn as VARCHAR(8000)), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_'))), '')), 2))
 as __event_key,
        
    lower(convert(varchar(50), hashbytes('md5', coalesce(convert(varchar(8000), coalesce(cast(id as VARCHAR(8000)), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_')), '')), 2))
      as __id,
        j.*
    from cdc_src
    cross apply OPENJSON(record_data) with (
        [id] int            '$.id',
        [ipc_id] int            '$.ipc_id',
        [product_id] int            '$.product_id',
        [uom_id] int            '$.uom_id',
        [custom_task_id] int            '$.custom_task_id',
        [project_id] int            '$.project_id',
        [currency_id] int            '$.currency_id',
        [sequence] int            '$.sequence',
        [company_id] int            '$.company_id',
        [create_uid] int            '$.create_uid',
        [write_uid] int            '$.write_uid',
        [description] varchar(max)   '$.description',
        [name] varchar(max)   '$.name',
        [display_type] varchar(max)   '$.display_type',
        [create_date] bigint         '$.create_date',
        [write_date] bigint         '$.write_date',
        [quantity] decimal(38,10) '$.quantity',
        [unit_price] decimal(38,10) '$.unit_price',
        [total_amount] decimal(38,10) '$.total_amount',
        [invoice_line_id] int            '$.invoice_line_id',
        [sale_order_line_id] int            '$.sale_order_line_id',
        [purchase_order_line_id] int            '$.purchase_order_line_id',
        [completed_qty] float          '$.completed_qty',
        [remaining_qty] float          '$.remaining_qty',
        [delivered_qty] float          '$.delivered_qty',
        [invoice_qty] float          '$.invoice_qty',
        [planned_qty] float          '$.planned_qty',
        [billed_qty] float          '$.billed_qty',
        [purchase_qty] float          '$.purchase_qty',
        [received_qty] float          '$.received_qty',
        [pending_qty] float          '$.pending_qty',
        [approved_to_date_qty] float          '$.approved_to_date_qty',
        [level] varchar(max)   '$.level',
        [wbs_code] varchar(max)   '$.wbs_code',
        [wbs_sort_key] varchar(max)   '$.wbs_sort_key',
        [origin_uom_name] varchar(max)   '$.origin_uom_name',
        [note] varchar(max)   '$.note',
        [section_total] decimal(38,10) '$.section_total',
        [total_amount_untaxed] decimal(38,10) '$.total_amount_untaxed',
        [total_amount_tax] decimal(38,10) '$.total_amount_tax',
        [analytic_distribution] varchar(max)   '$.analytic_distribution'
    ) as j
)

with snapshot_keyed as (

        'r'                                as __dbz_operation,
        cast('1970-01-01' as datetime2(6)) as __dbz_timestamp,

model.my_new_project.int_sale_order.name: int_sale_order
model.my_new_project.int_sale_order.description:
### Thông tin chung
- Ngày tạo: 2026-05-04
- Ngày cập nhật: 2026-05-18
- Người tạo: nghia.tt@cc1.vn
- Người yêu cầu: ngan.nguyen@cc1.vn,kien.lq@cc1.vn
- Kỹ thuật/Dev: xboss.Đông
### Mô tả chi tiết
- Dữ liệu này được sử dụng để xây dựng báo cáo sal
### Lỗi dữ liệu
- có phát hiện lỗi ở source: sale_order
### Columns
- sale_order_id: id của DB để quản lý đơn hàng
model.my_new_project.int_sale_order.raw_code:
select
    --key
    approval_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["a.id", "'sale.order'"]) }},
    employee_key = b.id,
    company_key = a.company_id,
    workflow_key
    ={{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            ["a.x_workflow_stage_id", "a.x_workflow_id", "NULL"]
        )
    }},
    project_key = a.contract_project_id,
    create_date_key = cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date),
    sale_order_key = a.id,
    --header attributes
    create_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    x_workflow_state_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date),
    a.x_workflow_stage_id,
    a.is_customer_contract,
    approval_code = a.name,
    approval_name = a.name,
    a.id,
    model = 'sale.order',
    link = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=1225&action=2156&model=sale.order&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(a.id as varchar)),
    active = 1,
    a.state,
    priority = 'unknow',
    payment_state = 'unknow',
    f.account_analytic_key,
    contract_type = 'sale.order.' + iif(a.is_customer_contract = 1, 'ab', 'sale'),
    customer_key = a.partner_id,
    --sla
    start_date      = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    end_date        = iif(d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date), null),
    days            = iif(
        d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id,
        datediff(day, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date), DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date)),
        datediff(day, cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date), getdate())
    )
from {{ ref("int_xboss__sale_order_current") }} a
left join
    {{ ref("int_xboss__hr_employee_current") }} b
    on a.user_id = b.user_id
    and a.company_id = b.company_id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
    and b.active = 1
left join
    {{ ref("int_sale_order_account_analytic_mapping") }} f on a.id = f.id
left join
    {{ ref("int_workflow_node_close_workflow") }} d on d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id
where a.__is_deleted = 0
    and a.company_id = 1
    and a.id not in (7138)

        d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id,
        datediff(day, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date), DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date)),
        datediff(day, cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date), getdate())
    )
from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__sale_order_current] a
left join
    [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__hr_employee_current] b
    on a.user_id = b.user_id
    and a.company_id = b.company_id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
    and b.active = 1
left join
    [wh_core].[cc1].[int_sale_order_account_analytic_mapping] f on a.id = f.id
left join
    [wh_core].[cc1].[int_workflow_node_close_workflow] d on d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id
where a.__is_deleted = 0
    and a.company_id = 1
    and a.id not in (7138)

        or c.name is null)

model.my_new_project.int_sale_order_acco.name: int_sale_order_account_analytic_mapping
model.my_new_project.int_sale_order_acco.raw_code:
with
    account_analytic as (
        select
            a.id,
            model = 'sale.order',
            business_plan_id = max(d.id),
            business_unit_id = max(e.id),
            department_id = max(f.id),
            revenue_item_id = max(g.id),
            cost_item_id = max(h.id)
        from
            {{ ref("int_xboss__sale_order_current") }} a
            cross apply openjson(a.analytic_distribution) b
            cross apply string_split(b. [key], ',') c
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} d
            on c. [value] = d.id
            and d.plan_id = 1
            and d.__is_deleted = 0
            and d.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} e
            on c. [value] = e.id
            and e.plan_id = 6
            and e.__is_deleted = 0
            and e.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} f
            on c. [value] = f.id
            and f.plan_id = 3
            and f.__is_deleted = 0
            and f.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} g
            on c. [value] = g.id
            and g.plan_id = 4
            and g.__is_deleted = 0
            and g.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} h
            on c. [value] = h.id
            and h.plan_id = 5
            and h.__is_deleted = 0
            and h.active = 1
        where a.__is_deleted = 0
            and a.company_id = 1
            and a.id not in (7138)
        group by a.id
    )
select
    *,
    account_analytic_key
    = {{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            [
                "business_plan_id",
                "business_unit_id",
                "department_id",
                "revenue_item_id",
                "cost_item_id",
            ]
        )
    }}

from account_analytic

model.my_new_project.int_approval_log_ba.description:
### Thông tin chung
- Ngày tạo: 20260518
- Ngày cập nhật: 20260518
- Người tạo: nghia.tt@cc1.vn
- Người cập nhật: _capnhat_
- Người yêu cầu: ngan.nguyen@cc1.vn
- Kỹ thuật/Dev: xboss.Dong
### Mô tả chi tiết
1. Xác định trễ/ quay lui (Mrs.Ngan- 20260511)
- Tính toán để xác định hồ sơ này có bị trễ/ bị quay lui hay không.
- Nhu cầu này được yêu cầu cho báo cáo sal. Logic của hồ sơ bị delay; nếu 1 trong các thay đổi stage trong lịch sử bị delay thì tính là delay
### Lỗi dữ liệu
- _mota
### Columns
- APPROVAL_KEY: Khóa
- is_backward: hồ sơ bị quay lui yes/no; nếu trong 1 trong các stage bị quay lui thì tính cả hồ sơ bị quay lui
- is_delay: hồ sơ bị delay lui yes/no; nếu trong 1 trong các stage bị delay thì tính cả hồ sơ bị delay
model.my_new_project.int_approval_log_ba.raw_code:
select
    approval_key,
    iif(sum(is_backward) > 0, 'yes', 'no') as is_backward,
    iif(sum(is_delay) > 0, 'yes', 'no') as is_delay,
    sum(estimated_processing_time) as estimated_processing_time_overall
from {{ ref("int_approval_log") }}
group by approval_key
model.my_new_project.int_approval_log_ba.compiled_code:

    sum(estimated_processing_time) as estimated_processing_time_overall
from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_approval_log]
group by approval_key

with account_analytic as (
    select
        a.id,
        business_plan_id = max(d.id),
        business_unit_id = max(e.id),
        department_id    = max(f.id),
        revenue_item_id  = max(g.id),
        cost_item_id     = max(h.id)
    from {{ ref('int_xboss__account_payment_current') }} a
    outer apply openjson(a.analytic_distribution) b
    outer apply string_split(b.[key], ',') c
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} d
        on c.[value] = d.id and d.plan_id = 1 and d.__is_deleted = 0 and d.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} e
        on c.[value] = e.id and e.plan_id = 6 and e.__is_deleted = 0 and e.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} f
        on c.[value] = f.id and f.plan_id = 3 and f.__is_deleted = 0 and f.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} g
        on c.[value] = g.id and g.plan_id = 4 and g.__is_deleted = 0 and g.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} h
        on c.[value] = h.id and h.plan_id = 5 and h.__is_deleted = 0 and h.active = 1
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
    group by a.id
)
select
     a.id
    ,a.business_plan_id
    ,a.business_unit_id
    ,a.department_id
    ,a.revenue_item_id
    ,a.cost_item_id
    ,account_analytic_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key([
        'a.business_plan_id',
        'a.business_unit_id',
        'a.department_id',
        'a.revenue_item_id',
        'a.cost_item_id'
    ]) }}
    ,[project_id]=max(b.id)
from account_analytic a
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} c
        on a.business_plan_id = c.id and c.__is_deleted = 0 and c.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__project_project_current') }} b
        on c.code = b.project_code and b.__is_deleted = 0 and b.active = 1
group by
    a.id
    ,a.business_plan_id
    ,a.business_unit_id
    ,a.department_id
    ,a.revenue_item_id
    ,a.cost_item_id
    ,{{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key([
        'a.business_plan_id',
        'a.business_unit_id',
        'a.department_id',
        'a.revenue_item_id',
        'a.cost_item_id'
    ]) }}

model.my_new_project.int_approval.name: int_approval
model.my_new_project.int_approval.raw_code:
with
    union_data as (
        {{
            dbt_utils.union_relations(
                relations=[
                    ref("int_hr_expense_sheet_approval"),
                    ref("int_employee_advance_approval"),
                    ref("int_sale_order"),
                    ref("int_purchase_order"),
                    ref("int_material_purchase_requisition"),
                    ref("int_job_costing"),
                ]
            )
        }}
    )
select
    a.*,
    is_backward = iif(b.is_backward = 'yes', 'Có', 'Không'),
    is_delay = iif(b.is_delay = 'yes', 'Có', 'Không'),
    is_error = iif(c.approval_key is null, 'Không', 'Có'),
    is_delay_overall = iif(b.estimated_processing_time_overall > a.days,'Có', 'Không')
from union_data a
left join
    {{ ref("int_approval_log_backward_and_delay") }} b
    on a.approval_key = b.approval_key
left join
    {{ ref("int_error__contract_and_log_node") }} c
    on a.approval_key = c.approval_key

model.my_new_project.int_sale_order_line.name: int_sale_order_line_ab
model.my_new_project.int_sale_order_line.raw_code:
select
    -- keys từ int_sale_order
    a.sale_order_key
    ,sale_order_line_key  = b.id
    ,ab_key = b.id
    ,a.approval_key
    ,a.employee_key
    ,a.company_key
    ,a.workflow_key
    ,a.project_key
    ,a.create_date_key
    ,a.account_analytic_key
    ,a.customer_key
    ,product_key = b.product_id
    ,contract_type_key = a.contract_type
    -- line attributes
    ,b.wbs_code
    ,b.level
    ,b.name
    ,b.analytic_distribution
    ,b.product_uom_qty
    ,b.remaining_qty
    ,b.complete_qty
    ,b.qty_delivered
    ,b.qty_invoiced
    ,b.product_uom
    ,b.price_unit
    ,b.price_subtotal
    ,b.section_total

from {{ ref("int_sale_order") }} a
inner join {{ ref("int_xboss__sale_order_line_current") }} b
    on a.id = b.order_id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
left join {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }} c
    on a.x_workflow_stage_id = c.id
    and c.__is_deleted = 0
    and c.id <> 20
where a.is_customer_contract  = 1 and json_value(c.name, '$.en_US') in ('Đã Ký')

model.my_new_project.int_material_purcha.name: int_material_purchase_requisition_account_analytic_mapping
model.my_new_project.int_material_purcha.raw_code:
with account_analytic
as
(
select
    a.id
    ,model = 'material.purchase.requisition'
    ,business_plan_id = max(d.id)
    ,business_unit_id = max(e.id)
    ,department_id = max(f.id)
    ,revenue_item_id = max(g.id)
    ,cost_item_id = max(h.id)
    FROM {{ ref('int_xboss__material_purchase_requisition_current') }} a
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(a.analytic_distribution) b
    CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(b.[key], ',') c
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} d
        on c.[value] = d.id and d.plan_id = 1 and d.__is_deleted = 0 and d.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} e
        on c.[value] = e.id and e.plan_id = 6 and e.__is_deleted = 0 and e.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} f
        on c.[value] = f.id and f.plan_id = 3 and f.__is_deleted = 0 and f.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} g
        on c.[value] = g.id and g.plan_id = 4 and g.__is_deleted = 0 and g.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} h
        on c.[value] = h.id and h.plan_id = 5 and h.__is_deleted = 0 and h.active = 1
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.company_id = 1
    group by a.id
)
select
    *
    , account_analytic_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key([
                'business_plan_id',
                'business_unit_id',
                'department_id',
                'revenue_item_id',
                'cost_item_id'
            ])}}

from account_analytic

    left join [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current] e

model.my_new_project.int_job_costing.name: int_job_costing
model.my_new_project.int_job_costing.raw_code:
select
    [approval_key] = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["a.id", "'job.costing'"]) }},
    [employee_key] = b.id,
    [company_key] = a.company_id,
    [workflow_key]
    ={{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            ["a.x_workflow_stage_id", "a.x_workflow_id", "NULL"]
        )
    }},
    [project_key] = a.project_id, -- job_costing không có contract_project_id, dùng project_id là đúng
    [create_date_key] = cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date),
    create_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    x_workflow_state_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date),
    [start_date]      = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    [end_date]        = iif(d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date), null),
    [days]            = iif(
        d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id,
        datediff(day, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date), DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date)),
        datediff(day, cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date), getdate())
    ),
    [approval_code] = a.name,
    [approval_name] = a.name,
    a.id,
    model = 'job.costing',
    [link] = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=1271&action=2180&model=job.costing&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(a.id as varchar)),
    active = 1,
    a.state,

model.my_new_project.int_account_payment.name: int_account_payment
model.my_new_project.int_account_payment.raw_code:
with pay as (
    select *,
        model        = 'account.payment',
        link         = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=556&action=773&model=account.payment&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(id as varchar)),
        create_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, create_date)
    from {{ ref('int_xboss__account_payment_current') }}
    where __is_deleted = 0
),
move as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_xboss__account_move_current') }}
    where __is_deleted = 0
    and company_id = 1
    and state = 'posted'
),
analytic as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_account_payment_account_analytic_mapping') }}
),
account as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_account_account') }}
)

select
    -- keys
    payment_key                         = cast(pay.id as varchar(50))
    ,company_key                        = move.company_id
    ,customer_key                       = pay.partner_id
    ,analytic.account_analytic_key
    ,project_key=analytic.project_id
    -- từ account_move (inherited fields)
    ,move.name                          -- số phiếu (INV/..., BNK/...)
    ,move.date                          -- ngày thanh toán
    ,move.journal_id
    ,move.state                         -- draft / posted / cancel
    ,move.payment_state                 -- not_paid / in_payment / paid

    -- từ account_payment (stored fields)
    ,pay.payment_type                   -- inbound / outbound
    ,pay.partner_type                   -- customer / supplier
    ,pay.payment_method_line_id
    ,pay.currency_id
    ,pay.amount
    ,pay.amount_company_currency_signed
    ,pay.destination_account_id
    ,pay.partner_bank_id
    ,pay.payment_reference              -- memo trên journal entry
    ,pay.ref                            -- số tham chiếu (CUST/CONTRACT/...)
    ,pay.disbursement_code
    ,pay.analytic_distribution
    ,pay.is_reconciled
    ,pay.is_matched
    ,pay.is_internal_transfer

    -- cột dẫn xuất
    ,pay.model
    ,pay.link
    ,pay.create_date_vn

    -- audit
    ,pay.create_date
    ,pay.write_date

from pay
inner join account on pay.destination_account_id = account.id
    and account.code in ('131101001', '131101002')
left join move    on pay.move_id = move.id
left join analytic on pay.id     = analytic.id

model.my_new_project.int_log_workflow_tr.name: int_log_workflow_trans_end_date
model.my_new_project.int_log_workflow_tr.raw_code:
select
    a.res_id as id,
    model,
    lead(a.create_uid) over (
        partition by a.model, a.res_id order by a.create_date
    ) as create_uid,
    a.node_to as node_to,
    cast(
        coalesce(
            json_value(c.name, '$.vi_VN'), json_value(c.name, '$.en_US')
        ) as varchar(1000)
    ) as node,
    a.create_date as start_date,
    lead(a.create_date) over (
        partition by a.model, a.res_id order by a.create_date
    ) as end_date,
    c.estimated_processing_time,
    a.is_backward,
    a.create_date,
    id_log=a.id
from {{ ref("int_log_workflow_trans_deduplication") }} a
inner join {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }} c on a.node_to = c.id
    and c.__is_deleted = 0
    and c.id <> 20

model.my_new_project.int_approval_projec.description:
### Thông tin chung
- Ngày tạo: 2026-05-12
- Người tạo: nghia.tt@cc1.vn
- Người yêu cầu: ngan.nguyen@cc1.vn
- Kỹ thuật/Dev: xboss.Hiếu, xboss.Đông
### Mô tả chi tiết
Dữ liệu mối quan hệ giữa approval và project. Bản chất dữ liệu về project không liên quan trực tiếp approval mà thông qua mối quan hệ trung gian giữa project và analytics_distribution.

Điều này dẫn đến 1 vấn đề đó là 1 analytics_distribution có thể liên kết với nhiều project nên -> approval có thể nằm ở nhiều project.

*Lưu ý:* Hiện tại để làm đơn giản hóa đang chỉ lấy 1 project đại diện cho 1 analytics_distribution; sau này khi phân tích sẽ hỏi thêm xboss và các phong ban để hiệu chỉnh phần này :0

    model = 'employee.advance',

from {{ ref("int_xboss__employee_advance_project_analytic_rel_current") }} t1
    inner join {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} t3
        on t1.account_analytic_id = t3.id
        and t3.__is_deleted = 0
        and t3.active = 1
    inner join {{ ref("int_xboss__project_project_current") }} t2
        on (t3.id = t2.analytic_account_id or t3.code = t2.project_code)
        and t2.__is_deleted = 0
        and t2.active = 1
where t1.__is_deleted = 0
group by t1. [employee_advance_id]
union all

    and t2.__is_deleted = 0
    and t2.active = 1
where t1.__is_deleted = 0
group by t1. [hr_expense_sheet_id]

model.my_new_project.int_res_company.name: int_res_company
model.my_new_project.int_res_company.raw_code:
with
    company_levels as (
        select
            c.id,
            c.parent_id,
            c.name,
            c.parent_path,
            max(case when s.ordinal = 1 then try_cast(s.value as int) end) as level1_id,
            max(case when s.ordinal = 2 then try_cast(s.value as int) end) as level2_id,
            max(case when s.ordinal = 3 then try_cast(s.value as int) end) as level3_id
        from {{ ref('int_xboss__res_company_current') }} c
        cross apply string_split(trim('/' from c.parent_path), '/', 1) s
        where c.__is_deleted = 0
            and c.active = 1
        group by c.id, c.parent_id, c.name, c.parent_path
    ),
    add_level as (
        select
            cl.id,
            cl.parent_id,
            cl.name,
            cl.parent_path,
            cl.level1_id,
            l1.name as level1_name,
            cl.level2_id,
            l2.name as level2_name,
            cl.level3_id,
            l3.name as level3_name
        from company_levels cl
        left join {{ ref('int_xboss__res_company_current') }} l1 on cl.level1_id = l1.id
        left join {{ ref('int_xboss__res_company_current') }} l2 on cl.level2_id = l2.id
        left join {{ ref('int_xboss__res_company_current') }} l3 on cl.level3_id = l3.id
    )
select
    id             as company_key,
    name           as company_name,
    level1_name    as company_level1,
    coalesce(level2_name, level1_name) as company_level2
from add_level

    ={{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            ["a.x_workflow_stage_id", "a.x_workflow_id", "a.expense_workflow_id"]
        )
    }},
    [project_key] = c.project_id,
    [create_date_key] = cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date),

    [end_date]        = iif(d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date), null),
    [days]            = iif(
        d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id,
        datediff(day, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date), DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date)),
        datediff(day, cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date), getdate())
    ),
    [approval_code] = a.name,
    [approval_name] = a.label,
    a.id,
    model = 'employee.advance',
    [link] = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=193&action=2123&active_id=118&model=employee.advance&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(a.id as varchar)),
    a.state,
    a.priority,
    a.payment_state,

    [customer_key] = a.partner_id
from {{ ref("int_xboss__employee_advance_current") }} as a
left join {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }} b
    on a.x_workflow_stage_id = b.id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
    and b.id <> 20
left join
    {{ ref("int_workflow_node_close_workflow") }} d on d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id
left join {{ ref("int_approval_project_link") }} c on a.id = c.id and c.model = 'employee.advance'

    {{ ref("int_employee_advance_account_analytic_mapping") }} e
    on a.id = e.id
where a.__is_deleted = 0
    and a.active = 1
    and a.company_id = 1

    [approval_code] = a.name,
    [approval_name] = a.label,
    a.id,
    model = 'employee.advance',
    [link] = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=193&action=2123&active_id=118&model=employee.advance&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(a.id as varchar)),
    a.state,
    a.priority,
    a.payment_state,
    e.account_analytic_key,
    [customer_key] = a.partner_id
from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__employee_advance_current] as a
left join [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__workflow_node_current] b
    on a.x_workflow_stage_id = b.id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
    and b.id <> 20
left join
    [wh_core].[cc1].[int_workflow_node_close_workflow] d on d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id
left join [wh_core].[cc1].[int_approval_project_link] c on a.id = c.id and c.model = 'employee.advance'
left join
    [wh_core].[cc1].[int_employee_advance_account_analytic_mapping] e
    on a.id = e.id
where a.__is_deleted = 0
    and a.active = 1
    and a.company_id = 1

model.my_new_project.int_workflow.name: int_workflow
model.my_new_project.int_workflow.raw_code:
with
    wf_node as (
        select *
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and id <> 20
    ),
    wf_base as (
        select *
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_base_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and id <> 20
    ),
    wf_config as (
        select *
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_config_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and active = 1
    )
select
    [workflow_key] ={{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["a.id", "b.id", "d.id"]) }},
    cast(
        coalesce(
            json_value(a.name, '$.vi_VN'), json_value(a.name, '$.en_US')
        ) as varchar(1000)
    ) as vn_workflow_stage,
    b.name as workflow_base,
    d.name as approval_workflow,
    approval_workflow_code = case
        when
            charindex('[', d.name) > 0
            and charindex(']', d.name) > charindex('[', d.name)
        then
            substring(
                d.name,
                charindex('[', d.name) + 1,
                charindex(']', d.name) - charindex('[', d.name) - 1
            )
        else 'Unknow'
    end,
    a.workflow_id * 100 + a.sequence as vn_workflow_stage_order,
    is_start = iif(a.is_start = 1, 'Mở', 'Không'),
    -- ,is_start_number = a.is_start
    is_end = iif(e.node_id is not null, 'Đóng', 'Chưa đóng'),
    -- ,is_end_number = a.is_close_workflow
    coalesce(c.group_name, 'Unknow') as group_name,
    coalesce(c.group_order, 0) as group_order,
    a.workflow_id,
    workflow_node_id = a.id,
    expense_workflow_id = d.id,
    a.sequence

from wf_node a
inner join wf_base b on a.workflow_id = b.id
inner join wf_config d on b.id = d.workflow_id
left join {{ ref("int_workflow_stages") }} c on a.id = c.id
left join {{ ref("int_workflow_node_close_workflow") }} e on a.id = e.node_id
union all
select
    [workflow_key] ={{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["a.id", "b.id", "NULL"]) }},
    cast(
        coalesce(
            json_value(a.name, '$.vi_VN'), json_value(a.name, '$.en_US')
        ) as varchar(1000)
    ) as vn_workflow_stage,
    workflow_base = b.name,
    approval_workflow = 'Unknow',
    approval_workflow_code = 'Unknow',
    vn_workflow_stage_order
    = a.workflow_id * 100 + iif(d.id is null, a.sequence, d.sequence),
    is_start = iif(a.is_start = 1, 'Mở', 'Không'),
    -- ,is_start_number = a.is_start
    is_end = iif(e.node_id is not null, 'Đóng', 'Chưa đóng'),
    -- ,is_end_number = a.is_close_workflow
    group_name = coalesce(c.group_name, 'Unknow'),
    group_order = coalesce(c.group_order, 0),
    a.workflow_id,
    workflow_node_id = a.id,
    expense_workflow_id = null,
    a.sequence
from wf_node a
inner join wf_base b on a.workflow_id = b.id
left join {{ ref("int_workflow_stages") }} c on a.id = c.id
left join
    {{ ref("int_workflow_node_misss_sequence") }} d
    on a.workflow_id = a.workflow_id
    and a.id = d.id
left join {{ ref("int_workflow_node_close_workflow") }} e on a.id = e.node_id

model.my_new_project.int_approval_age_gr.name: int_approval_age_groups
model.my_new_project.int_approval_age_gr.description:
### Thông tin chung
- Ngày tạo: 2026-05-12
- Người tạo: nghia.tt@cc1.vn
- Người yêu cầu: ngan.nguyen@cc1.vn
- Kỹ thuật/Dev: nghia.tt@cc1.vn
### Mô tả chi tiết
Phân nhóm số chứng từ đang chờ duyệt theo age bucket (0–1 ngày, 2–3 ngày,4-7, >7 ngày).
### Columns
- APPROVAL_AGE_GROUP_KEY: Key được sử dụng để nối với approval; sau khi đã được tính toán dựa theo days xử lý để biết được approval đó thuộc nhóm nào
- approval_age_group_name: Tên nhóm 0–1 ngày, 2–3 ngày,4-7 ngày, >7 ngày
- approval_age_group_order: Sử dụng để sắp xếp approval_age_group_name
model.my_new_project.int_approval_age_gr.raw_code:
select
    1 as approval_age_group_key,
    '0-1 ngày' as approval_age_group_name,
    1 as approval_age_group_order
union all
select 2, '2-3 ngày', 2
union all
select 3, '4-7 ngày', 3
union all
select 4, 'Trên 7 ngày', 4

model.my_new_project.int_workflow_node_m.name: int_workflow_node_misss_sequence
model.my_new_project.int_workflow_node_m.raw_code:
select
    id,
    workflow_id,
    [sequence] = row_number() over (partition by workflow_id order by id)
from {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }}
where __is_deleted = 0
    and id <> 20
    and workflow_id in (
        select workflow_id
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and id <> 20
        group by workflow_id
        having sum([sequence]) = 0
    )

model.my_new_project.int_construction_ip.name: int_construction_ipc_account_analytic_mapping
model.my_new_project.int_construction_ip.raw_code:
with account_analytic as (
    select
        a.id,
        business_plan_id = max(d.id),
        business_unit_id = max(e.id),
        department_id    = max(f.id),
        revenue_item_id  = max(g.id),
        cost_item_id     = max(h.id)
    from {{ ref('int_xboss__construction_ipc_current') }} a
    outer apply openjson(a.analytic_distribution) b
    outer apply string_split(b.[key], ',') c
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} d
        on c.[value] = d.id and d.plan_id = 1 and d.__is_deleted = 0 and d.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} e
        on c.[value] = e.id and e.plan_id = 6 and e.__is_deleted = 0 and e.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} f
        on c.[value] = f.id and f.plan_id = 3 and f.__is_deleted = 0 and f.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} g
        on c.[value] = g.id and g.plan_id = 4 and g.__is_deleted = 0 and g.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} h
        on c.[value] = h.id and h.plan_id = 5 and h.__is_deleted = 0 and h.active = 1
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.active = 1
        and a.company_id = 1
    group by a.id
)
select
    *,
    account_analytic_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key([
        'business_plan_id',
        'business_unit_id',
        'department_id',
        'revenue_item_id',
        'cost_item_id'
    ]) }}
from account_analytic

model.my_new_project.int_purchase_order.name: int_purchase_order
model.my_new_project.int_purchase_order.raw_code:
select
    --keys
    approval_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["a.id", "'purchase.order'"]) }},
    employee_key = b.id,
    company_key = a.company_id,
    workflow_key
    ={{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            ["a.x_workflow_stage_id", "a.x_workflow_id", "NULL"]
        )
    }},
    project_key = a.contract_project_id,
    create_date_key = cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date),
    customer_key = a.partner_id,
    f.account_analytic_key,
    purchase_order_key = a.id,
    --attributes
    a.x_workflow_stage_id,
    a.is_sub_contract,
    create_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    x_workflow_state_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date),
    start_date      = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    end_date        = iif(d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date), null),
    days            = iif(
        d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id,
        datediff(day, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date), DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date)),
        datediff(day, cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date), getdate())
    ),
    approval_code = a.name,
    approval_name = a.name,
    a.id,

,

model.my_new_project.int_approval_log.name: int_approval_log
model.my_new_project.int_approval_log.description:
### Thông tin chung
- Ngày tạo: 2026-05-12
- Người tạo: nghia.tt@cc1.vn
- Người yêu cầu: ngan.nguyen@cc1.vn
- Kỹ thuật/Dev: xboss.Hiếu, xboss.Đông
### Mô tả chi tiết
Sau khi đã xử lý liệu log ở từng loại hồ sơ thì gom nhóm lại.
Lý do không xử lý tất cả trong 1 flow bởi vì phải mapping log với các bảng sinh log trước để lấy các thông liên quan không nằm trong log.
model.my_new_project.int_approval_log.raw_code:
with
    eap as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'employee.advance',
            create_date,
            company_id,
            responsible_id,
            active,
            x_workflow_id,
            expense_workflow_id,
            is_sub_contract     = cast(null as int),
            is_customer_contract = cast(null as int),
            partner_id
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__employee_advance_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and active = 1
            and company_id = 1
    ),
    hes as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'hr.expense.sheet',
            create_date,
            company_id,
            responsible_id,
            active,
            x_workflow_id,
            expense_workflow_id,
            is_sub_contract     = cast(null as int),
            is_customer_contract = cast(null as int),
            partner_id
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__hr_expense_sheet_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and active = 1
            and company_id = 1
    ),
    so as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'sale.order',
            create_date,
            company_id,
            responsible_id      = cast(null as int),
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            x_workflow_id,
            expense_workflow_id = cast(null as int),
            is_sub_contract     = cast(null as int),
            is_customer_contract,
            partner_id
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__sale_order_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and company_id = 1
            and id not in (7138)
    ),
    po as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'purchase.order',
            create_date,
            company_id,
            responsible_id      = cast(null as int),
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            x_workflow_id,
            expense_workflow_id = cast(null as int),
            is_sub_contract,
            is_customer_contract = cast(null as int),
            partner_id
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__purchase_order_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and company_id = 1
    ),
    mpr as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'material.purchase.requisition',
            create_date,
            company_id,
            responsible_id      = cast(null as int),
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            x_workflow_id,
            expense_workflow_id = cast(null as int),
            is_sub_contract     = cast(null as int),
            is_customer_contract = cast(null as int),
            partner_id
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__material_purchase_requisition_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and company_id = 1
    ),
    jc as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'job.costing',
            create_date,
            company_id,
            responsible_id      = cast(null as int),
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            x_workflow_id,
            expense_workflow_id = cast(null as int),
            is_sub_contract     = cast(null as int),
            is_customer_contract = cast(null as int),
            partner_id          = cast(null as int)
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__job_costing_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and company_id = 1
    ),
    union_data as (
        select * from eap
        union all select * from hes
        union all select * from so
        union all select * from po
        union all select * from mpr
        union all select * from jc
    ),
    add_days as (
        select
            approval_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["a.id", "a.model"]) }},
            approval_log_key = a.id_log,
            a.id,
            a.model,
            coalesce(e.id, d.id, 0) as employee_id,
            a.node_to,
            b.expense_workflow_id,
            cast(b.create_date as date) as create_date,
            b.company_id as company_id,
            a.start_date,
            a.end_date,
            c.is_end,
            iif(
                c.is_end = 1,
                0,
                datediff(day, a.start_date, coalesce(a.end_date, getdate()))
            ) as days,
            a.estimated_processing_time,
            node,
            a.is_backward,
            f.project_id,
            b.x_workflow_id,
            g.account_analytic_key,
            customer_key = b.partner_id,
            contract_type_key = case
                when b.model = 'sale.order'
                then b.model + '.' + iif(b.is_customer_contract = 1, 'ab', 'sale')
                when b.model = 'purchase.order'
                then b.model + '.' + iif(b.is_sub_contract = 1, 'bb', 'purchase')
                else b.model
            end
        from {{ ref("int_log_workflow_trans_end_date") }} a
        inner join union_data b on a.id = b.id and a.model = b.model
        left join
            {{ ref("int_workflow_node_close_workflow") }} c on a.node_to = c.node_id
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__hr_employee_current") }} d
            on b.responsible_id = d.user_id
            and b.company_id = d.company_id
            and d.__is_deleted = 0
            and d.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__hr_employee_current") }} e
            on a.create_uid = e.user_id
            and b.company_id = e.company_id
            and e.__is_deleted = 0
            and e.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_approval_project_link") }} f
            on a.id = f.id
            and a.model = f.model
        left join
            {{ ref("int_account_analytic_union") }} g
            on a.id = g.id
            and a.model = g.model
        where b.active = 1
    -- and a.model in ('employee.advance','hr.expense.sheet')
    )
select
    a.approval_key,
    a.approval_log_key,
    employee_key = a.employee_id,
    workflow_key
    = {{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            ["a.node_to", "a.x_workflow_id", "a.expense_workflow_id"]
        )
    }},
    create_date_key = a.create_date,
    company_key = a.company_id,
    project_key = a.project_id,
    a.start_date,
    a.end_date,
    a.days,
    is_delay = iif(a.is_end = 1, 0, iif(days > a.estimated_processing_time, 1, 0)),
    a.is_backward,
    a.id,
    a.model,
    is_error = iif(c.approval_key is null, 'No', 'Yes'),
    a.account_analytic_key,
    a.contract_type_key,
    a.customer_key,
    a.estimated_processing_time
from add_days a
left join
    {{ ref("int_error__contract_and_log_node") }} c
    on a.approval_key = c.approval_key

with
    wf_node as (
        select *
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and id <> 20
    ),
    purchase as (
        select id, group_name = 'Front Office', group_order = 1
        from wf_node
        where
            workflow_id in (
                select x_workflow_id
                from {{ ref("int_xboss__purchase_order_current") }}
                where __is_deleted = 0
                    and x_workflow_id is not null
                group by x_workflow_id
            )
    ),
    saleorder as (
        select id, group_name = 'Back Office', group_order = 2
        from wf_node
        where
            workflow_id in (
                select x_workflow_id
                from {{ ref("int_xboss__sale_order_current") }}
                where __is_deleted = 0
                    and x_workflow_id is not null
                group by x_workflow_id
            )
    ),
    pr as (
        select id, group_name = 'Front Office', group_order = 1
        from wf_node
        where
            workflow_id in (
                select x_workflow_id
                from {{ ref("int_xboss__material_purchase_requisition_current") }}
                where __is_deleted = 0
                    and x_workflow_id is not null
                    and company_id = 1
                group by x_workflow_id
            )
            and json_value(name, '$.en_US')
            not in ('Hoàn Thành Cung Ứng', 'CV Cung Ứng')
        union all
        select id, group_name = 'Back Office', group_order = 2
        from wf_node
        where
            workflow_id in (
                select x_workflow_id
                from {{ ref("int_xboss__material_purchase_requisition_current") }}
                where __is_deleted = 0
                    and x_workflow_id is not null
                    and company_id = 1
                group by x_workflow_id
            )
            and json_value(name, '$.en_US') in ('Hoàn Thành Cung Ứng', 'CV Cung Ứng')
    ),
    jc as (
        select id, group_name = 'Front Office', group_order = 1
        from wf_node
        where workflow_id = 40 and id < 387
        union all
        select id, group_name = 'Front Office', group_order = 1
        from wf_node
        where workflow_id = 40 and id >= 387
        union all
        select id, group_name = 'Front Office', group_order = 1
        from wf_node
        where workflow_id = 24 and id < 198
        union all
        select id, group_name = 'Front Office', group_order = 1
        from wf_node
        where workflow_id = 24 and id >= 198
    )
select id, group_name, group_order
from {{ ref("seed_workflow_stages") }}
union all
select id, group_name, group_order
from purchase
union all
select id, group_name, group_order
from saleorder
union all
select id, group_name, group_order
from pr
union all
select id, group_name, group_order
from jc

model.my_new_project.int_hr_expense_shee.name: int_hr_expense_sheet_approval
model.my_new_project.int_hr_expense_shee.raw_code:
select
    [approval_key] = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["a.id", "'hr.expense.sheet'"]) }},
    [employee_key] = a.employee_id,
    [company_key] = a.company_id,
    -- ,[RESPONSIBLE_EMPLOYEE_KEY]=COALESCE(a.responsible_id,a.account_responsible_id)
    [workflow_key]
    ={{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            ["a.x_workflow_stage_id", "a.x_workflow_id", "a.expense_workflow_id"]
        )
    }},
    [project_key] = c.project_id,
    [create_date_key] = cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date),
    create_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    x_workflow_state_date_vn = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date),
    [start_date]      = DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date),
    [end_date]        = iif(d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date), null),
    [days]            = iif(
        d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id,
        datediff(day, DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date), DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.x_workflow_state_date)),
        datediff(day, cast(DATEADD(HOUR, 7, a.create_date) as date), getdate())
    ),
    [approval_code] = a.code,
    [approval_name] = a.name,
    a.id,
    model = 'hr.expense.sheet',
    [link] = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=193&action=845&active_id=105&model=hr.expense.sheet&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(a.id as varchar)),
    a.state,
    a.priority,
    a.payment_state,
    e.account_analytic_key,
    [customer_key] = a.partner_id
from {{ ref("int_xboss__hr_expense_sheet_current") }} as a
inner join {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_node_current") }} b
    on a.x_workflow_stage_id = b.id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
    and b.id <> 20
left join
    {{ ref("int_workflow_node_close_workflow") }} d on d.node_id = a.x_workflow_stage_id
left join {{ ref("int_approval_project_link") }} c on a.id = c.id and c.model = 'hr.expense.sheet'
left join
    {{ ref("int_hr_expense_sheet_account_analytic_mapping") }} e
    on a.id = e.id
where a.__is_deleted = 0
    and a.active = 1
    and a.company_id = 1

model.my_new_project.int_purchase_order_.name: int_purchase_order_account_analytic_mapping
model.my_new_project.int_purchase_order_.raw_code:
with
    account_analytic as (
        select
            a.id,
            model = 'purchase.order',
            business_plan_id = max(d.id),
            business_unit_id = max(e.id),
            department_id = max(f.id),
            revenue_item_id = max(g.id),
            cost_item_id = max(h.id)
        from
            {{ ref("int_xboss__purchase_order_current") }} a
            cross apply openjson(a.analytic_distribution) b
            cross apply string_split(b. [key], ',') c
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} d
            on c. [value] = d.id
            and d.plan_id = 1
            and d.__is_deleted = 0
            and d.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} e
            on c. [value] = e.id
            and e.plan_id = 6
            and e.__is_deleted = 0
            and e.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} f
            on c. [value] = f.id
            and f.plan_id = 3
            and f.__is_deleted = 0
            and f.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} g
            on c. [value] = g.id
            and g.plan_id = 4
            and g.__is_deleted = 0
            and g.active = 1
        left join
            {{ ref("int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current") }} h
            on c. [value] = h.id
            and h.plan_id = 5
            and h.__is_deleted = 0
            and h.active = 1
        where a.__is_deleted = 0
            and a.company_id = 1
        group by a.id
    )
select
    *,
    account_analytic_key
    = {{
        dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(
            [
                "business_plan_id",
                "business_unit_id",
                "department_id",
                "revenue_item_id",
                "cost_item_id",
            ]
        )
    }}

from account_analytic

model.my_new_project.int_employee_advanc.name: int_employee_advance_account_analytic_mapping
model.my_new_project.int_employee_advanc.raw_code:
with account_analytic
as
(
select
    a.id
    ,model = 'employee.advance'
    ,business_plan_id = max(d.id)
    ,business_unit_id = max(e.id)
    ,department_id = COALESCE(max(f.id), max(j.id))
    ,revenue_item_id = max(g.id)
    ,cost_item_id = max(h.id)
    FROM {{ ref('int_xboss__employee_advance_current') }} a
    OUTER APPLY OPENJSON(a.analytic_distribution) b
    OUTER APPLY STRING_SPLIT(b.[key], ',') c
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} d
        on c.[value] = d.id and d.plan_id = 1 and d.__is_deleted = 0 and d.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} e
        on c.[value] = e.id and e.plan_id = 6 and e.__is_deleted = 0 and e.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} f
        on c.[value] = f.id and f.plan_id = 3 and f.__is_deleted = 0 and f.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} g
        on c.[value] = g.id and g.plan_id = 4 and g.__is_deleted = 0 and g.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} h
        on c.[value] = h.id and h.plan_id = 5 and h.__is_deleted = 0 and h.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__hr_department_current') }} i
        on a.[department_id] = i.id and i.__is_deleted = 0
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} j
        on i.analytic_account_id = j.id and j.__is_deleted = 0 and j.active = 1
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.active = 1
        and a.company_id = 1
    group by a.id
)
select
    *
    , account_analytic_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key([
                'business_plan_id',
                'business_unit_id',
                'department_id',
                'revenue_item_id',
                'cost_item_id'
            ])}}

from account_analytic

model.my_new_project.int_account_analyti.name: int_account_analytic_deduplication
model.my_new_project.int_account_analyti.raw_code:
WITH ranked_data AS (
    SELECT
        account_analytic_key
        ,business_plan_id
        ,business_unit_id
        ,department_id
        ,revenue_item_id
        ,cost_item_id
        -- Đánh số thứ tự cho từng nhóm account_analytic_key
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY account_analytic_key 
            ORDER BY id DESC
         ) AS row_num
    FROM {{ ref('int_account_analytic_union') }}
)
SELECT 
     account_analytic_key
    ,business_plan_id
    ,business_unit_id
    ,department_id
    ,revenue_item_id
    ,cost_item_id
FROM ranked_data
WHERE row_num = 1 -- Chỉ lấy duy nhất 1 dòng cho mỗi key

model.my_new_project.int_log_workflow_tr.name: int_log_workflow_trans_deduplication
model.my_new_project.int_log_workflow_tr.raw_code:
with
    next_node as (
        select
            a.id,
            a.model,
            a.username,
            a.create_uid,
            a.res_id,
            a.create_date,
            a.node_id,
            a.trans_id,
            b.node_to,
            lead(node_id) over (
                partition by a.model, a.res_id order by a.create_date
            ) as next_node,
            is_backward = iif(a.active = 0, 1, 0)
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__log_workflow_trans_current") }} a
        left join {{ ref("int_xboss__workflow_trans_current") }} b on a.trans_id = b.id
        where a.__is_deleted = 0
            and concat(b.node_to, '$$', b.workflow_id)
            not in (select _node from {{ ref("int_workflow_trans_decisions") }})
            and a.id not in (
                296794,
                306410,
                306411,
                306413,
                306415,
                306417,
                306418,
                306421,
                306424,
                306441,
                306440
            )
    -- and model = 'employee.advance'
    ),
    dedup as (select * from next_node where node_id <> isnull(next_node, '-1'))
select *
from dedup a

model.my_new_project.int_hr_expense_shee.name: int_hr_expense_sheet_account_analytic_mapping
model.my_new_project.int_hr_expense_shee.raw_code:
with account_analytic
as
(
select
    a.id
    ,model = 'hr.expense.sheet'
    ,business_plan_id = max(d.id)
    ,business_unit_id = max(e.id)
    ,department_id = COALESCE(max(f.id), max(j.id))
    ,revenue_item_id = max(g.id)
    ,cost_item_id = max(h.id)
    FROM {{ ref('int_xboss__hr_expense_sheet_current') }} a
    OUTER APPLY OPENJSON(a.analytic_distribution) b
    OUTER APPLY STRING_SPLIT(b.[key], ',') c
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} d
        on c.[value] = d.id and d.plan_id = 1 and d.__is_deleted = 0 and d.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} e
        on c.[value] = e.id and e.plan_id = 6 and e.__is_deleted = 0 and e.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} f
        on c.[value] = f.id and f.plan_id = 3 and f.__is_deleted = 0 and f.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} g
        on c.[value] = g.id and g.plan_id = 4 and g.__is_deleted = 0 and g.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} h
        on c.[value] = h.id and h.plan_id = 5 and h.__is_deleted = 0 and h.active = 1
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__hr_department_current') }} i
        on a.[department_id] = i.id and i.__is_deleted = 0
    left join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current') }} j
        on i.analytic_account_id = j.id and j.__is_deleted = 0 and j.active = 1
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.active = 1
        and a.company_id = 1
    group by a.id
)
select
    *
    , account_analytic_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key([
                'business_plan_id',
                'business_unit_id',
                'department_id',
                'revenue_item_id',
                'cost_item_id'
            ])}}

from account_analytic

model.my_new_project.int_error__ap_dupli.name: int_error__ap_duplicate_payment
model.my_new_project.int_error__ap_dupli.raw_code:
with dup_groups as (
    select
        b.business_plan_id,
        a.amount,
        string_agg(cast(a.id as varchar(20)), ',') as tags
    from {{ ref('int_xboss__account_payment_current') }} a
    inner join {{ ref('int_account_account') }} acc
        on a.destination_account_id = acc.id
        and acc.code in ('131101001', '131101002')
    left join {{ ref('int_account_payment_account_analytic_mapping') }} b on a.id = b.id
    inner join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_move_current') }} c
        on a.move_id = c.id
        and c.__is_deleted = 0
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
      and b.business_plan_id is not null
      and c.state = 'posted'
      and c.company_id = 1
    group by b.business_plan_id, a.amount
    having count(1) > 1
),
split_ids as (
    select distinct
        cast(s.value as int) as payment_id,
        {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(['d.business_plan_id', 'd.amount']) }} as duplicate_group
    from dup_groups d
    cross apply string_split(d.tags, ',') s
)

select
    a.id,
    model = 'account.payment',
    link  = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=556&action=773&model=account.payment&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(a.id as varchar)),
    error_code      = 'AP001',
    duplicate_group = si.duplicate_group
from split_ids si
inner join {{ ref('int_xboss__account_payment_current') }} a
    on si.payment_id = a.id
    and a.__is_deleted = 0

model.my_new_project.int_error_snapshot.name: int_error_snapshot
model.my_new_project.int_error_snapshot.raw_code:
{{
    config(
        materialized = 'incremental',
        incremental_strategy = 'append'
    )
}}

-- Incremental thay thế dbt snapshot: append 1 lần/ngày, không UPDATE/DELETE
-- Nhanh hơn ~3x so với snapshot vì chỉ 1 INSERT thay vì CREATE tmp + UPDATE + INSERT

{% if is_incremental() %}

select
    error_key
    ,error_code
    ,id
    ,model
    ,link
    ,duplicate_group
    ,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) as snapshot_date
from {{ ref('error') }} e
where not exists (
    select 1
    from {{ this }} h
    where h.snapshot_date = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    and h.error_key = e.error_key
)

{% else %}

select
    error_key
    ,error_code
    ,id
    ,model
    ,link
    ,duplicate_group
    ,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) as snapshot_date
from {{ ref('error') }}

{% endif %}

    ,duplicate_group
    ,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) as snapshot_date
from [wh_core].[cc1].[error] e
where not exists (

    from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_error_snapshot] h
    where h.snapshot_date = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

)

model.my_new_project.int_error__workflow.name: int_error__workflow
model.my_new_project.int_error__workflow.raw_code:
with wf_close_count as
(
    -- đếm node kết thúc theo từng workflow (xử lý riêng PO id 43/46 dùng is_final_approval)
    select a.id, count(b.id) as cnt
    from {{ ref('int_xboss__workflow_base_current') }} a
        left join {{ ref('int_xboss__workflow_node_current') }} b
            on a.id = b.workflow_id
            and b.__is_deleted = 0
            and b.id <> 20
            and (
                (a.id not in (43, 46) and b.is_close_workflow = 1)
                or (a.id in (43, 46) and b.is_final_approval = 1)
            )
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.id <> 20
    group by a.id
),

wf_mapped as
(
    -- workflow đã có ít nhất 1 stage trong seed_workflow_stages
    select b.workflow_id
    from {{ ref('int_workflow_stages') }} a
        inner join {{ ref('int_xboss__workflow_node_current') }} b
            on a.id = b.id
            and b.__is_deleted = 0
            and b.id <> 20
    group by b.workflow_id
),

WF001 as (select id from wf_close_count where cnt = 0),

WF002 as (select id from wf_close_count where cnt > 1),

WF003 as
(
    -- node thuộc workflow đã mapping nhưng bản thân node chưa có trong seed_workflow_stages
    select a.id, a.workflow_id
    from {{ ref('int_xboss__workflow_node_current') }} a
        inner join wf_mapped b on a.workflow_id = b.workflow_id
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.id <> 20
        and a.id not in (select id from {{ ref('int_workflow_stages') }})
)

select b.id,
    model = 'workflow.base',
    link = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&model=workflow.base&view_type=form&menu_id=193', '{id}', cast(b.id as varchar)),
    a.error_code
from (
    select id, error_code = 'WF001' from WF001
    union all
    select id, error_code = 'WF002' from WF002
    union all
    select id, error_code = 'WF003' from WF003
) a
inner join {{ ref('int_xboss__workflow_base_current') }} b
    on a.id = b.id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
    and b.id <> 20
model.my_new_project.int_error__workflow.compiled_code:
with wf_close_count as
(
    -- đếm node kết thúc theo từng workflow (xử lý riêng PO id 43/46 dùng is_final_approval)
    select a.id, count(b.id) as cnt
    from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__workflow_base_current] a
        left join [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__workflow_node_current] b
            on a.id = b.workflow_id
            and b.__is_deleted = 0
            and b.id <> 20
            and (
                (a.id not in (43, 46) and b.is_close_workflow = 1)
                or (a.id in (43, 46) and b.is_final_approval = 1)
            )
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.id <> 20
    group by a.id
),

wf_mapped as
(
    -- workflow đã có ít nhất 1 stage trong seed_workflow_stages
    select b.workflow_id
    from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_workflow_stages] a
        inner join [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__workflow_node_current] b
            on a.id = b.id
            and b.__is_deleted = 0
            and b.id <> 20
    group by b.workflow_id
),

WF001 as (select id from wf_close_count where cnt = 0),

WF002 as (select id from wf_close_count where cnt > 1),

WF003 as
(
    -- node thuộc workflow đã mapping nhưng bản thân node chưa có trong seed_workflow_stages
    select a.id, a.workflow_id
    from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__workflow_node_current] a
        inner join wf_mapped b on a.workflow_id = b.workflow_id
    where a.__is_deleted = 0
        and a.id <> 20
        and a.id not in (select id from [wh_core].[cc1].[int_workflow_stages])
)

select b.id,
    model = 'workflow.base',
    link = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&model=workflow.base&view_type=form&menu_id=193', '{id}', cast(b.id as varchar)),
    a.error_code
from (
    select id, error_code = 'WF001' from WF001
    union all
    select id, error_code = 'WF002' from WF002
    union all
    select id, error_code = 'WF003' from WF003
) a
inner join [wh_core].[cc1].[int_xboss__workflow_base_current] b
    on a.id = b.id
    and b.__is_deleted = 0
    and b.id <> 20

model.my_new_project.int_error__contract.name: int_error__contract_and_log_node
model.my_new_project.int_error__contract.raw_code:
with
    eap as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'employee.advance',
            x_workflow_id,
            x_workflow_stage_id,
            company_id,
            active,
            link                = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=193&action=2123&active_id=118&model=employee.advance&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(id as varchar))
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__employee_advance_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and active = 1
    ),
    hes as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'hr.expense.sheet',
            x_workflow_id,
            x_workflow_stage_id,
            company_id,
            active,
            link                = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=193&action=845&active_id=105&model=hr.expense.sheet&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(id as varchar))
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__hr_expense_sheet_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and active = 1
    ),
    so as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'sale.order',
            x_workflow_id,
            x_workflow_stage_id,
            company_id,
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            link                = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=1225&action=2156&model=sale.order&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(id as varchar))
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__sale_order_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
            and id not in (7138)
    ),
    po as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'purchase.order',
            x_workflow_id,
            x_workflow_stage_id,
            company_id,
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            link                = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=1156&action=1924&model=purchase.order&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(id as varchar))
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__purchase_order_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
    ),
    mpr as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'material.purchase.requisition',
            x_workflow_id,
            x_workflow_stage_id,
            company_id,
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            link                = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=1221&action=2139&model=material.purchase.requisition&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(id as varchar))
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__material_purchase_requisition_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
    ),
    jc as (
        select
            id,
            model               = 'job.costing',
            x_workflow_id,
            x_workflow_stage_id,
            company_id,
            active              = cast(1 as int),
            link                = replace('https://intranet.cc1.vn/web?debug=1#id={id}&cids=1&menu_id=1271&action=2180&model=job.costing&view_type=form', '{id}', cast(id as varchar))
        from {{ ref("int_xboss__job_costing_current") }}
        where __is_deleted = 0
    ),
    union_data as (
        select * from eap
        union all select * from hes
        union all select * from so
        union all select * from po
        union all select * from mpr
        union all select * from jc
    )
select
    approval_key = {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(["id", "model"]) }},
    a.id,
    a.model,
    a.x_workflow_stage_id,
    b.node_to,
    a.link,
    error_code = 'CN001'
from
    union_data a
    outer apply
    (
        select top 1 t.node_to
        from {{ ref("int_log_workflow_trans_deduplication") }} t
        where t.res_id = a.id and t.model = a.model
        order by t.create_date desc
    ) b
where a.company_id = 1 and (a.x_workflow_stage_id <> b.node_to or a.x_workflow_stage_id is null) and a.active = 1

where t1.__is_deleted = 0

model.my_new_project.int_xboss__ir_model.name: int_xboss__ir_model_fields_current
model.my_new_project.int_xboss__ir_model.description:
## int_xboss__ir_model_fields_current

Current-state model cho bảng `ir_model_fields`: merge snapshot (OneLake) với CDC events (Eventhouse),
giữ bản ghi mới nhất theo `__dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC`.

**Nguồn snapshot:** `source('xboss', 'ir_model_fields')` — full-load từ OneLake (Lakehouse shortcut)
**Nguồn CDC:** `ref('stg_xboss_cdc__ir_model_fields')` — sự kiện thay đổi realtime từ Eventhouse
**PK:** `id` | **Filter mart:** `__is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1`

### CDC control columns
| Column | Mô tả |
|--------|-------|
| `__id` | Surrogate key (latest-wins) |
| `__is_deleted` | 1 = đã xóa (tombstone CDC) |
| `__last_changed_at` | Thời điểm thay đổi cuối |

### Business columns
| Column | Type | PK | FK | Nullable | Label (VN) | Label (EN) | Mô tả |
|--------|------|:--:|:--:|----------|-----------|-----------|-------|
| `id` | int | ✓ |  | NOT NULL | ID | ID |  |
| `relation_field_id` | int |  | -> ir_model_fields.id | NULL | Trường quan hệ | Relation field |  |
| `model_id` | int |  | -> ir_model.id | NULL | Mô hình | Model | Mô hình chứa trường này |
| `related_field_id` | int |  | -> ir_model_fields.id | NULL | Trường liên quan | Related field |  |
| `size` | int |  |  | NULL | Kích thước | Size |  |
| `create_uid` | int |  | -> res_users.id | NULL | Được tạo bởi | Created by |  |
| `write_uid` | int |  | -> res_users.id | NULL | Cập nhật lần cuối bởi | Last Updated by |  |
| `name` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Tên Trường | Field Name |  |
| `complete_name` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Tên Đầy đủ | Complete Name |  |
| `model` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Tên mô hình | Model Name | Tên kỹ thuật của mô hình chứa trường này |
| `relation` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Đối tượng liên quan | Related Model | Đối với các trường quan hệ, tên kỹ thuật của mô hình đích |
| `relation_field` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Trường quan hệ | Relation Field | Đối với các trường one2many, trường trên mô hình đích triển khai mối quan hệ many2one đối nghịch |
| `ttype` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Loại Trường | Field Type | Loại Trường. |
| `related` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Trường liên quan | Related Field | Trường liên quan tương ứng, nếu có. Đây phải là danh sách tên trường được phân tách bằng dấu chấm. |
| `state` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Loại | Type | Loại. |
| `on_delete` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Khi Xóa | On Delete | Khi xoá thuộc tính của trường many2one. |
| `domain` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Miền | Domain | Miền tùy chọn dùng để giới hạn các giá trị có thể đối với các trường quan hệ, được chỉ định là một biểu thức Python, định nghĩa một danh sách các bộ ba. Ví dụ: [(''màu'',''='',''đỏ'')] |
| `relation_table` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Bảng liên quan | Relation Table | Được sử dụng để để tùy biến trường kiểu many2many để định nghĩa một tên bảng quan hệ tùy chỉnh |
| `column1` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Cột 1 | Column 1 | Cột đề cập đến bản ghi trong bảng mô hình |
| `column2` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Cột 2 | Column 2 | Cột đề cập đến bản ghi trong bảng comodel |
| `depends` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Phụ thuộc | Dependencies | Các phần phụ thuộc của phương pháp tính toán; danh sách các tên trường được phân tách bằng dấu phẩy, như |
| `currency_field` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Trường tiền tệ | Currency field | Tên của trường Many2one chứa res.currency |
| `field_description` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Nhãn trường | Field Label |  |
| `help` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Hỗ trợ Trường | Field Help |  |
| `compute` | varchar(max) |  |  | NULL | Tính toán | Compute | Mã dùng để tính giá trị của trường. |
| `copied` | bit |  |  | NULL | Đã sao chép | Copied | Giá trị của trường có được sao chép khi nhân bản bản ghi không. |
| `required` | bit |  |  | NULL | Bắt buộc | Required |  |
| `readonly` | bit |  |  | NULL | Chỉ đọc | Readonly |  |
| `index` | bit |  |  | NULL | Được lập chỉ mục | Indexed |  |
| `translate` | bit |  |  | NULL | Có thể dịch | Translatable | Cho phép dịch nội dung của trường này (kích hoạt cơ chế dịch cho trường thông tin này) |
| `group_expand` | bit |  |  | NULL | Mở rộng Nhóm | Expand Groups | Nếu chọn, tất cả các bản ghi của mô hình đích sẽ được đưa vào |
| `selectable` | bit |  |  | NULL | Có thể chọn được | Selectable |  |
| `store` | bit |  |  | NULL | Đã lưu | Stored | Cho phép lưu giá trị vào trong cơ sở dữ liệu. |
| `sanitize` | bit |  |  | NULL | Làm sạch HTML | Sanitize HTML |  |
| `sanitize_overridable` | bit |  |  | NULL | Làm sạch HTML có thể ghi đè | Sanitize HTML overridable |  |
| `sanitize_tags` | bit |  |  | NULL | Làm sạch thẻ HTML | Sanitize HTML Tags |  |
| `sanitize_attributes` | bit |  |  | NULL | Làm sạch thuộc tính HTML | Sanitize HTML Attributes |  |
| `sanitize_style` | bit |  |  | NULL | Làm sạch kiểu HTML | Sanitize HTML Style |  |
| `sanitize_form` | bit |  |  | NULL | Làm sạch biểu mẫu HTML | Sanitize HTML Form |  |
| `strip_style` | bit |  |  | NULL | Strip Style Attribute | Strip Style Attribute |  |
| `strip_classes` | bit |  |  | NULL | Strip Class Attribute | Strip Class Attribute |  |
| `create_date` | datetime2(6) |  |  | NULL | Được tạo vào | Created on |  |
| `write_date` | datetime2(6) |  |  | NULL | Cập nhật lần cuối vào | Last Updated on |  |
| `tracking` | int |  |  | NULL | Bật theo dõi có thứ tự | Enable Ordered Tracking | Nếu chọn, mọi sửa đổi thực hiện trong trường này sẽ được theo dõi. Giá trị được sử dụng để yêu cầu giá trị theo dõi. |
| `website_form_blacklisted` | bit |  |  | NULL | Đã đưa vào danh sách đen của biểu mẫu web | Blacklisted in web forms | Đưa trường này vào danh sách đen của biểu mẫu web |
| `serialization_field_id` | int |  | -> ir_model_fields.id | NULL | Trường tuần tự hoá | Serialization Field | Nếu thiết lập, trường này sẽ được lưu trữ trong cấu trúc thưa thớt của trường tuần tự hóa, thay vì có cột cơ sở dữ liệu riêng. Điều này không thể thay đổi sau khi tạo. |
| `custom_tracking` | bit |  |  | NULL | Theo dõi Tùy chỉnh | Custom Tracking |  |

model.my_new_project.int_xboss__account_.description:
## int_xboss__account_payment_current

Current-state model cho bảng `account_payment`: merge snapshot (OneLake) với CDC events (Eventhouse),
giữ bản ghi mới nhất theo `__dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC`.

**Nguồn snapshot:** `source('xboss', 'account_payment')` — full-load từ OneLake (Lakehouse shortcut)
**Nguồn CDC:** `ref('stg_xboss_cdc__account_payment')` — sự kiện thay đổi realtime từ Eventhouse
**PK:** `id` | **Filter mart:** `__is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1`

### CDC control columns
| Column | Mô tả |
|--------|-------|
| `__id` | Surrogate key (latest-wins) |
| `__is_deleted` | 1 = đã xóa (tombstone CDC) |
| `__last_changed_at` | Thời điểm thay đổi cuối |

model.my_new_project.int_xboss__construc.description:
## int_xboss__construction_ipc_deduction_current

Current-state model cho bảng `construction_ipc_deduction`: merge snapshot (OneLake) với CDC events (Eventhouse),
giữ bản ghi mới nhất theo `__dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC`.

**Nguồn snapshot:** `source('xboss', 'construction_ipc_deduction')` — full-load từ OneLake (Lakehouse shortcut)
**Nguồn CDC:** `ref('stg_xboss_cdc__construction_ipc_deduction')` — sự kiện thay đổi realtime từ Eventhouse
**PK:** `id` | **Filter mart:** `__is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1`

### CDC control columns
| Column | Mô tả |
|--------|-------|
| `__id` | Surrogate key (latest-wins) |
| `__is_deleted` | 1 = đã xóa (tombstone CDC) |
| `__last_changed_at` | Thời điểm thay đổi cuối |

Current-state model cho bảng `res_partner`: merge snapshot (OneLake) với CDC events (Eventhouse),
giữ bản ghi mới nhất theo `__dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC`.

**Nguồn snapshot:** `source('xboss', 'res_partner')` — full-load từ OneLake (Lakehouse shortcut)
**Nguồn CDC:** `ref('stg_xboss_cdc__res_partner')` — sự kiện thay đổi realtime từ Eventhouse
**PK:** `id` | **Filter mart:** `__is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1`

### CDC control columns
| Column | Mô tả |
|--------|-------|
| `__id` | Surrogate key (latest-wins) |
| `__is_deleted` | 1 = đã xóa (tombstone CDC) |
| `__last_changed_at` | Thời điểm thay đổi cuối |

model.my_new_project.int_xboss__res_part.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='incremental', incremental_strategy='merge',
          unique_key=['__id']) }}

with staged as (
    select *
    from {{ ref('stg_xboss_cdc__res_partner') }}
    {% if is_incremental() %}
      where __dbz_timestamp >= (select COALESCE(MAX(__dbz_timestamp), cast('1970-01-01' as datetime2(6))) from {{ this }})
    {% endif %}
),
ranked as (
    select *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY __id ORDER BY __dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC) as rn
    from staged
)
select
    __dbz_operation,
    __dbz_timestamp,
    __dbz_lsn,
    __id,
    case when __dbz_operation = 'd' then 1 else 0 end as __is_deleted,
    __dbz_timestamp                                    as __last_changed_at,
        [id],
        [company_id],
        {{ epoch_to_datetime2('create_date') }} as [create_date],
        [name],
        [title],
        [parent_id],
        [user_id],
        [state_id],
        [country_id],
        [industry_id],

        {{ epoch_to_date('date') }} as [date],
        [comment],
        [partner_latitude],
        [partner_longitude],
        [active],
        [employee],
        [is_company],
        [partner_share],
        {{ epoch_to_datetime2('write_date') }} as [write_date],
        [message_bounce],
        [email_normalized],
        [signup_type],
        {{ epoch_to_datetime2('signup_expiration') }} as [signup_expiration],
        [signup_token],
        [phone_sanitized],
        [plan_to_change_car],
        [plan_to_change_bike],
        {{ epoch_to_datetime2('calendar_last_notif_ack') }} as [calendar_last_notif_ack],
        [website_id],

        [website_meta_title],
        [website_meta_description],
        [website_meta_keywords],
        [seo_name],

        {{ epoch_to_date('date_localization') }} as [date_localization],
        [supplier_rank],

        [debit_limit],
        {{ epoch_to_datetime2('last_time_entries_checked') }} as [last_time_entries_checked],

model.my_new_project.int_xboss__account_.name: int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current
model.my_new_project.int_xboss__account_.description:
## int_xboss__account_analytic_account_current

Current-state model cho bảng `account_analytic_account`: merge snapshot (OneLake) với CDC events (Eventhouse),
giữ bản ghi mới nhất theo `__dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC`.

**Nguồn snapshot:** `source('xboss', 'account_analytic_account')` — full-load từ OneLake (Lakehouse shortcut)
**Nguồn CDC:** `ref('stg_xboss_cdc__account_analytic_account')` — sự kiện thay đổi realtime từ Eventhouse
**PK:** `id` | **Filter mart:** `__is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1`

### CDC control columns
| Column | Mô tả |
|--------|-------|
| `__id` | Surrogate key (latest-wins) |
| `__is_deleted` | 1 = đã xóa (tombstone CDC) |
| `__last_changed_at` | Thời điểm thay đổi cuối |

### Business columns

model.my_new_project.int_xboss__employee.description:
## int_xboss__employee_advance_current

Current-state model cho bảng `employee_advance`: merge snapshot (OneLake) với CDC events (Eventhouse),
giữ bản ghi mới nhất theo `__dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC`.

**Nguồn snapshot:** `source('xboss', 'employee_advance')` — full-load từ OneLake (Lakehouse shortcut)
**Nguồn CDC:** `ref('stg_xboss_cdc__employee_advance')` — sự kiện thay đổi realtime từ Eventhouse
**PK:** `id` | **Filter mart:** `__is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1`

### CDC control columns
| Column | Mô tả |
|--------|-------|
| `__id` | Surrogate key (latest-wins) |
| `__is_deleted` | 1 = đã xóa (tombstone CDC) |
| `__last_changed_at` | Thời điểm thay đổi cuối |

with staged as (
    select *
    from {{ ref('stg_xboss_cdc__employee_advance') }}
    {% if is_incremental() %}
      where __dbz_timestamp >= (select COALESCE(MAX(__dbz_timestamp), cast('1970-01-01' as datetime2(6))) from {{ this }})
    {% endif %}
),
ranked as (
    select *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY __id ORDER BY __dbz_timestamp DESC, __dbz_lsn DESC) as rn
    from staged
)
select
    __dbz_operation,
    __dbz_timestamp,
    __dbz_lsn,
    __id,
    case when __dbz_operation = 'd' then 1 else 0 end as __is_deleted,
    __dbz_timestamp                                    as __last_changed_at,
